Read all project files before responding. The site is chill-dogs.com, an Amazon affiliate dog lifestyle site.

- `CONTEXT.md` is the primary reference — strategy, page map, tech stack, and creative guidelines.
- `docs/article-writing-guide.md` governs all content tone and structure.
- `docs/web-systems-adventure-mode.md` is the governing framework for how the site is built and why.
